a:["$","$Lc",null,{"toc":[{"depth":2,"url":"#1-prerequisites","title":"Prerequisites","_step":1},{"depth":2,"url":"#2-quick-pull-of-rustfs-official-image","title":"Quick Pull of RustFS Official Image","_step":2},{"depth":2,"url":"#3-run-rustfs-container","title":"Run RustFS Container","_step":3},{"depth":3,"url":"#complete-parameter-configuration-example","title":"Complete Parameter Configuration Example"},{"depth":3,"url":"#parameter-description-and-corresponding-methods","title":"Parameter Description and Corresponding Methods"},{"depth":3,"url":"#common-configuration-combinations","title":"Common Configuration Combinations"},{"depth":3,"url":"#important-notes","title":"Important Notes"},{"depth":3,"url":"#docker-compose-installation","title":"Docker Compose Installation"},{"depth":2,"url":"#4-verification-and-access","title":"Verification and Access","_step":4},{"depth":2,"url":"#5-multiple-nodes","title":"Multiple Nodes","_step":5},{"depth":2,"url":"#6-other-recommendations","title":"Other Recommendations","_step":6},{"depth":2,"url":"#summary","title":"Summary"}],"children":[["$","$Ld",null,{"children":"Installing RustFS with Docker"}],["$","$Le",null,{"className":"mb-0","children":"RustFS Docker deployment."}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-row gap-2 items-center border-b pt-2 pb-6","children":[["$","$Lf",null,{"markdownUrl":"/installation/docker.md"}],["$","$L10",null,{"markdownUrl":"/installation/docker.md","githubUrl":"https://github.com/rustfs/docs.rustfs.com/blob/main/content/installation/docker/index.md"}]]}],["$","$L11",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"children":"RustFS is a high-performance, 100% S3-compatible open-source distributed object storage system. In single-node single-disk (SNSD) deployment mode, the backend uses zero erasure coding without additional data redundancy, suitable for local testing and small-scale scenarios.\nThis article is based on RustFS official Linux binary packages, packaging RustFS and its runtime environment into containers through custom Dockerfile, and configuring data volumes and environment variables for one-click service startup."}],"\n",["$","hr",null,{}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"fd-steps","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"fd-step","children":[["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"1-prerequisites","data-fd-step":"1","children":"Prerequisites"}],["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Host Requirements"}]}],"\n"]}],["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Docker installed (≥ 20.10) and able to pull images and run containers normally"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Local path ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/mnt/rustfs/data"}]," (or custom path) for mounting object data"]}],"\n"]}],["$","ol",null,{"start":"2","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Network and Firewall"}]}],"\n"]}],["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Ensure host port 9000 is open to external access (or consistent with custom port)"}],"\n"]}],["$","ol",null,{"start":"3","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Configuration File Preparation"}]}],"\n"]}],["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Define listening port, admin account, data path, etc. in host ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/etc/rustfs/config.toml"}]," (see Section 4 for details)"]}],"\n"]}],["$","ol",null,{"start":"4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["RustFS container run as non-root user ",["$","code",null,{"children":"rustfs"}]," with id ",["$","code",null,{"children":"10001"}],", if you run docker with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"-v"}]," to mount host directory into docker container, please make sure the owner of host directory has been changed to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"10001"}],", otherwise you will encounter permission denied error. You can run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"chown -R 10001:10001 /path/to/host_directory"}]," to grant the necessary permissions."]}],"\n"]}],["$","hr",null,{}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"fd-step","children":[["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"2-quick-pull-of-rustfs-official-image","data-fd-step":"2","children":"Quick Pull of RustFS Official Image"}],"$L13","$L14","$L15"]}],"$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19"]}],"\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b"]}],"$undefined"]}]

13:["$","p",null,{"children":"Use official Ubuntu base image to quickly pull RustFS official image:"}]

\\"}]]}]]}]}]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Command Line Parameter Method"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","$L1c",null,{"className":"shiki shiki-themes github-light 25:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h3","id":"docker-compose-installation","children":"Docker Compose Installation"}]
26:["$","p",null,{"children":["RustFS officially provides a Docker Compose installation method. The ",["$","$L38",null,{"href":"https://github.com/rustfs/rustfs/blob/main/docker-compose.yml","children":["$","code",null,{"children":"docker-compose.yml"}]}]," file includes multiple services, such as ",["$","code",null,{"children":"grafana"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"prometheus"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"otel-collector"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"jaeger"}],", mainly for observability. If you want to deploy these services together, clone the ",["$","$L38",null,{"href":"https://github.com/rustfs/rustfs","children":"RustFS code repository"}]," locally,"]}]

2a:["$","p",null,{"children":["Providing the necessary permissions. An initialization container is necessary to grant the correct access rights to rustfs using the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"depends_on"}]," keyword. In the example below the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"rustfs_perms"}]," service is added to the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"docker-compose.yml"}]," to handle this. To ensure logs are persisted and accessible, we map the host log directory to the container's ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/logs"}]," path"]}]

"}]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#22863A","--shiki-dark":"#85E89D"},"children":"
